places.name: Kashi — Agni's Teaching
places.modernInfo: The Agni Purana was narrated by the fire god Agni to sage Vasishtha at Kashi. It contains encyclopedic knowledge — rituals, weapons, medicine, grammar, statecraft.

scenes.title: Agni narrates the encyclopaedia
scenes.description: The fire god Agni narrated this Purana to sage Vasishtha at Kashi — the world's oldest city. The Agni Purana contains the most comprehensive knowledge: from temple construction to warfare to medicine to poetry.

scenes.title: The eternal fire of Manikarnika
scenes.description: The cremation fires of Manikarnika have never been extinguished for thousands of years. The Agni Purana explains that dying in Kashi, the fire of Agni transforms the soul directly into liberation.
